overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} & {- \langle \tilde {\eta} _ {i \sigma} \tilde {T} _ {1} \tilde {\xi} _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \rangle = t \sum_ {j, \delta , \sigma^ {\prime}} \langle f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}} \tilde {n} _ {j \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}} f _ {j \sigma^ {\prime}} ^ {\dagger} f _ {j + \delta \sigma^ {\prime}} (1 - \tilde {n} _ {j + \delta \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}}) (1 - \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}}) f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \rangle} \\ & {\qquad = t \sum_ {j, \delta , \sigma^ {\prime}} \delta_ {i j} \delta_ {\bar {\sigma} \sigma^ {\prime}} \langle f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \tilde {n} _ {j \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}} f _ {j \sigma^ {\prime}} ^ {\dagger} f _ {j + \delta \sigma^ {\prime}} (1 - \tilde {n} _ {j + \delta \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}}) (1 - \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}}) f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dant} \rangle} \\ & {\qquad + t \sum_ {j, \delta , \sigma^ {\prime}} \langle f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \tilde {n} _ {j \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}} f _ {j \sigma^ {\prime}} ^ {\dagger} \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}} f _ {j + \delta \sigma^ {\prime}} (1 - \tilde {n} _ {j + \delta \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}}) (1 - \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}}) f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \rangle} \\ & {\qquad = t \sum_ {\delta} \langle f _ {i \sigma} \tilde {n} _ {i \sigma} f _ {i \bar {\sigma}} ^ {\dagger} f _ {i + \delta \bar {\sigma}} (1 - \tilde {n} _ {i + \delta \sigma}) (1 - \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}}) f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \rangle} \\ & {\qquad + t \sum_ {j, \delta , \sigma^ {\prime}} \langle f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \tilde {n} _ {j \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}} f _ {j \sigma^ {\prime}} ^ {\dagger} \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}} f _ {j + \delta \sigma^ {\prime}}, (1 - \tilde {n} _ {j + \delta \bar {\sigma} ^ {\prime}}) (1 - \tilde {n} _ {i \bar {\sigma}}) f _ {i \sigma} ^ {\dagger} \rangle ,} \end{array}
